name: Anemone
description: A sea creature often found in coral reefs, known for its vibrant colors and stinging tentacles.

name: Barnacle
description: A small, shelled crustacean that attaches itself to rocks and ships' hulls.

name: Clam
description: A bivalve mollusk with a hard shell, often found buried in the sand.

name: Dolphin
description: A highly intelligent marine mammal known for its playful behavior and communication skills.

name: Eel
description: A long, snake-like fish that inhabits both freshwater and saltwater environments.

name: Fish
description: A diverse group of aquatic animals with gills and fins, found in various aquatic habitats.

name: Gull
description: A seabird often seen near coastlines and beaches, known for its distinctive call.

name: Hermit Crab
description: A crustacean that uses empty shells as protection for its soft abdomen.

name: Jellyfish
description: A translucent, gelatinous creature with tentacles and a drifting lifestyle in the ocean.

name: Kelp
description: A type of large brown algae that forms underwater forests and provides habitat for marine life.

name: Lobster
description: A crustacean with a hard exoskeleton and powerful claws, often used as seafood.

name: Manatee
description: A large, slow-moving marine mammal, also known as a sea cow.

name: Nudibranch
description: A colorful and often small sea slug found in tropical oceans.

name: Octopus
description: A highly intelligent cephalopod mollusk with eight arms and a beak-like mouth.

name: Penguin
description: A flightless bird adapted to life in the sea, often found in polar regions.

name: Quahog
description: A type of edible clam with a hard shell, commonly used in seafood dishes.

name: Ray
description: A flat-bodied fish with a cartilaginous skeleton, often found on the ocean floor.

name: Sea Turtle
description: A marine reptile known for its distinctive flippers and nesting habits on beaches.

name: Seahorse
description: A small fish with a distinctive upright posture and a curling tail.

name: Shark
description: A large, predatory fish with sharp teeth and a streamlined body.

name: Starfish
description: A marine invertebrate with radial symmetry and tube feet, often found in tide pools.

name: Tuna
description: A fast-swimming, predatory fish often sought after for its meat.

name: Urchin
description: A spiny marine creature often found on rocks and reefs.

name: Venus Flytrap
description: A carnivorous plant that captures insects with its hinged leaves, often found in boggy areas near the coast.

name: Whale
description: A large marine mammal, some of which are the largest animals on Earth.

name: X-ray Tetra
description: A small, transparent fish with a distinctive stripe, often kept in aquariums.

name: Yellow Tang
description: A brightly colored fish found in coral reefs, known for its vibrant yellow coloration.

name: Zebra Shark
description: A species of carpet shark with a pattern of dark spots, resembling a zebra.
